logger.message: #['[MCP] Request method=' ++ (vars.mcpMethod default '?') ++ ' id=' ++ ((vars.mcpId default 'null') as String)]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Plant__r.Name, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c, SUM(Target_FTE__c) totalTarget, SUM(Approved_FTE_Coverage__c) totalApproved, SUM(Gap_To_Target__c) totalGap FROM GWB_HQ_Target__c WHERE Quarter__c = ':quarter' GROUP BY Plant__r.Name, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c ORDER BY Plant__r.Plant_Code__c ASC
SELECT SUM(FTE_Impact__c) totalFTE, SUM(Dollar_Impact__c) totalDollar, COUNT(Id) ideaCount FROM GWB_Productivity_Idea__c WHERE Status__c IN ('Pending Approval', 'Approved')

SELECT Name, Quarter__c, Target_FTE__c, Approved_FTE_Coverage__c, Gap_To_Target__c, Production_Context__c, Plant_Shop__r.Name, Plant_Shop__r.Shop_Type__c FROM GWB_HQ_Target__c WHERE Plant__r.Plant_Code__c = ':plantCode' ORDER BY Quarter__c DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT Name, Status__c, FTE_Impact__c, Dollar_Impact__c, Confidence_Score__c, Effort__c, AI_Generated__c, Plant_Function__r.Plant_Shop__r.Name FROM GWB_Productivity_Idea__c WHERE Plant_Function__r.Plant_Shop__r.Plant__r.Plant_Code__c = ':plantCode' AND Status__c IN ('Pending Approval', 'Approved') ORDER BY Confidence_Score__c DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

SELECT Id, Name, Status__c, FTE_Impact__c, Dollar_Impact__c, Confidence_Score__c, Effort__c, AI_Generated__c, Assumptions__c, Benchmark_Evidence__c, Required_Validations__c, Plant_Function__r.Name, Plant_Function__r.Plant_Shop__r.Name, CreatedDate FROM GWB_Productivity_Idea__c WHERE Plant_Function__r.Plant_Shop__r.Plant__r.Plant_Code__c = ':plantCode' AND Status__c = 'Pending Approval' ORDER BY Confidence_Score__c DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20

logger.message: #['[MCP] Tool pending_ideas complete for ' ++ vars.plantCode ++ ': ' ++ (sizeOf(payload.result.content[0].text) as String) ++ ' chars']

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: #["SELECT Id, Name, Idea_Category__c, Description__c, Typical_FTE_Min__c, Typical_FTE_Max__c, Typical_Effort__c, Requires_Safety_Review__c, Requires_Quality_Review__c, Requires_Finance_Approval__c FROM GWB_Idea_Library__c WHERE Name LIKE '%" ++ vars.ideaName ++ "%' LIMIT 1"]

#["SELECT Plant__r.Name, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c, Shop_Type__c, Achieved_FTE__c, Quarter__c, Production_Context__c, Notes__c FROM GWB_Plant_Benchmark__c WHERE Idea_Library__r.Name LIKE '%" ++ vars.ideaName ++ "%' ORDER BY Achieved_FTE__c DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10"]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var lib = vars.ideaLib var benchmarks = payload var avgFTE = if (sizeOf(benchmarks) > 0) (benchmarks reduce ((b, acc = 0.0) -> acc + (b.Achieved_FTE__c default 0.0))) / sizeOf(benchmarks) else 0 --- { jsonrpc: "2.0", id: vars.mcpId, result: { content: [{ 'type': "text", text: write({ ideaName: vars.ideaName, category: lib.Idea_Category__c, description: lib.Description__c, typicalFTERange: (lib.Typical_FTE_Min__c default 0) ++ " – " ++ (lib.Typical_FTE_Max__c default 0), effort: lib.Typical_Effort__c, requiresSafety: lib.Requires_Safety_Review__c default false, requiresQuality: lib.Requires_Quality_Review__c default false, requiresFinance: lib.Requires_Finance_Approval__c default false, benchmarkCount: sizeOf(benchmarks), averageAchievedFTE: avgFTE, benchmarks: benchmarks map { plant: $.`Plant__r.Name`, code: $.`Plant__r.Plant_Code__c`, shop: $.Shop_Type__c, quarter: $.Quarter__c, achieved: $.Achieved_FTE__c, context: $.Production_Context__c, notes: $.Notes__c } }, "application/json") }] } }

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Status__c, FTE_Impact__c, Dollar_Impact__c FROM GWB_Productivity_Idea__c WHERE Id = ':ideaId' AND Status__c = 'Pending Approval' LIMIT 1
SELECT Id, Name, Quarter__c, Target_FTE__c, Gap_To_Target__c, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c, Plant_Shop__r.Name FROM GWB_HQ_Target__c WHERE Id = ':targetId' LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var t = vars.triggerTarget --- { targetId: vars.triggerTargetId, plantCode: (t.Plant__r.Plant_Code__c default t.'Plant__r.Plant_Code__c') default "", shopName: (t.Plant_Shop__r.Name default t.'Plant_Shop__r.Name') default "", quarter: t.Quarter__c default "" }
